info.title: httping
info.description: Nuget package of 'Httping' provided by Aiursoft

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Ping a server with HTTP protocol.

options.name: --server
options.description: The server address to ping. Can be a domain name or an IP address.

options.name: --count
options.description: The number of echo requests to send. The default is 4. [default: 4]

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Timeout in milliseconds to wait for each reply. The default is 5000. [default: 5000]

options.name: --interval
options.description: Time in milliseconds to wait between pings. The default is 1000. [default: 1000]

options.name: --insecure
options.description: Allow insecure server connections when using SSL. [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Quiet output. Nothing is displayed except the summary lines at startup time and when finished. [default: False]

options.name: --no-proxy
options.description: Do not use a proxy server. [default: False]
